hero.subtitle: Sentence Gym · Drill every sentence until it's instinct
hero.body: AI generates the questions, AI grades the answers, and every question is pooled for reuse. Translation, paraphrase, and grammar drills — three modes, one closed loop.

boards.title: One gym, three ways to train
boards.body: Each mode runs the full loop — generate, answer, judge, feedback. Pick one to start, or alternate between all three.

practice.title: Practice
practice.subtitle: Translation
practice.desc: Bidirectional translation across six language pairs: ja-en / en-ja / ja-zh / zh-ja / en-zh / zh-en. AI generates, AI grades.

paraphrase.title: Paraphrase
paraphrase.subtitle: Rephrase
paraphrase.desc: Source in Japanese or English — rephrase it while keeping the meaning. AI scores fidelity and naturalness.

grammar.title: Grammar Focus
grammar.subtitle: Targeted Drills
grammar.desc: Fill-in-the-blank, multiple choice, and error correction keyed to grammar points. Focus on te-form, present-perfect, and more.

flow.title: One complete training loop
flow.body: Four steps from question to feedback make each session reviewable. Questions are pooled and reused — the more you train, the faster it gets.

generate.title: Generate
generate.caption: AI composes
generate.desc: AI generates the question and pools it. Matching dimensions are reused first — the more you train, the faster it gets.

answer.title: Answer
answer.caption: You respond
answer.desc: Translate, paraphrase, or choose — then submit your answer.

judge.title: Judge
judge.caption: AI evaluates
judge.desc: AI compares your answer to the reference and returns correct or incorrect.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.caption: Review & record
feedback.desc: Explanation, suggestions, and example sentences — saved to your history and stats.

cta.title: Ready for your first set?
cta.body: 20 free Credits for new users · 1 Credit per generated question

health.title: Health Check
health.body: Verify the Nuxt SSR → Cloudflare D1 binding → Prisma chain. The response below should return {okCode}.
health.stack: Nuxt 3 SSR · Cloudflare Workers · D1 · Prisma

footer.stack: Nuxt 3 SSR · Cloudflare Workers · D1 · Prisma

auth.name: Display name (optional)
auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your training
auth.toLogin: Already have an account? Sign in

errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters
